# PDF Fixtures

These PDFs are small test fixtures copied from open-source project repositories.

## Mozilla PDF.js

Source repository:

- https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js

License:

- Apache License 2.0
- https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js/blob/master/LICENSE

Files:

- `pdfjs-basicapi.pdf`
  - Source: `test/pdfs/basicapi.pdf`
  - Raw URL: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mozilla/pdf.js/master/test/pdfs/basicapi.pdf
- `pdfjs-tracemonkey.pdf`
  - Source: `test/pdfs/tracemonkey.pdf`
  - Raw URL: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mozilla/pdf.js/master/test/pdfs/tracemonkey.pdf

The fixtures are used for parser smoke tests and should stay small enough to keep the repository lightweight.
